nasb.text: You divided the sea by Your strength; You broke the heads of the sea monsters in the waters.

esv.text: You divided the sea by your might; you broke the heads of the sea monsters on the waters.

cnv.text: 你曾用你的大能分開大海， 把海中怪獸的頭都打碎了。

ccb.text: 你曾用大能分开海水， 打碎水中巨兽的头。

csbs.text: 你以你的力量分开了海洋， 打碎了众水中巨兽的头。
